custom_css: :root { --vm-navy: #18324d; --vm-deep: #102235; --vm-slate: #61758b; --vm-line: #d9e3ec; --vm-soft: #f4f7fb; --vm-card: rgba(255,255,255,0.96); --vm-accent: #2566a8; --vm-success: #127a52; --vm-danger: #b63f4d; } body { background-image: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(16,34,53,0.12), rgba(16,34,53,0) 36%), radial-gradient(circle at 15% 20%, rgba(37,102,168,0.18), rgba(37,102,168,0) 34%), radial-gradient(circle at 85% 12%, rgba(52,110,158,0.16), rgba(52,110,158,0) 26%), linear-gradient(180deg, #f7fafc 0%, #eef4f8 52%, #e8eff5 100%); background-attachment: fixed; color: var(--vm-deep); } body::before { content: ''; position: fixed; inset: 0; background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.36) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.34) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 32px 32px; opacity: 0.18; pointer-events: none; } .page_content { padding-top: 1.8rem; padding-bottom: 3rem; } .page-footer, footer { opacity: 0.45; } .web-form-container { max-width: 1120px; position: relative; } .web-form-container::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: -1.2rem auto auto -2.8rem; width: 210px; height: 210px; border-radius: 999px; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(37,102,168,0.18), rgba(37,102,168,0) 70%); pointer-events: none; } .web-form-header { padding: 0 0.25rem; } .web-form-head { padding: 0 0 1.4rem; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(217,227,236,0.9); } .web-form-title h1 { margin-bottom: 0.45rem; font-size: clamp(2.1rem, 4vw, 3.25rem); line-height: 1.04; letter-spacing: -0.035em; color: var(--vm-navy); } .web-form-title h1::before { content: 'International Visitor Gateway'; display: inline-flex; margin-bottom: 0.9rem; padding: 0.34rem 0.92rem; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(37,102,168,0.1); color: var(--vm-accent); font-size: 0.76rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 800; } .web-form-introduction { max-width: 760px; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.72; color: var(--vm-slate); } .web-form { margin-top: 1.6rem; padding: 2.15rem 2.1rem 1.55rem; border: 1px solid rgba(217,227,236,0.95); border-radius: 30px; background: var(--vm-card); box-shadow: 0 24px 80px rgba(15,23,42,0.08); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); } .row.form-section { margin-bottom: 1.65rem; padding: 1.3rem 1.2rem 1rem; border: 1px solid #e0e8f1; border-radius: 22px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(251,253,255,1), rgba(245,249,252,0.94)); } .section-head { margin-bottom: 1.15rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 0.76rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--vm-accent); } .form-column { padding-left: 0.65rem; padding-right: 0.65rem; } .form-group { margin-bottom: 1.2rem; } .control-label { margin-bottom: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 700; color: #22384f; } .form-control, .form-select, .like-disabled-input { min-height: 3.2rem; border-radius: 16px !important; border: 1px solid var(--vm-line) !important; background: #fcfdff; box-shadow: none !important; color: var(--vm-deep); transition: border-color 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, transform 0.18s ease; } .form-control:focus, .form-select:focus { border-color: rgba(37,102,168,0.7) !important; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(37,102,168,0.12) !important; background: #fff; } .control-input-wrapper .control-value.like-disabled-input { display: none !important; } .vm-locked-display { display: flex; align-items: center; min-height: 3.2rem; padding: 0.8rem 1rem; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid #dce6ef; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f5f8fc, #eef3f8); color: #17324d; font-weight: 700; } .help-box.small.text-muted { margin-top: 0.42rem; font-size: 0.74rem; color: #71839a !important; } .vm-status-panel { margin: 0 0 1.2rem; padding: 1rem 1.05rem; border-radius: 18px; border: 1px solid var(--vm-line); } .vm-status-title { margin-bottom: 0.24rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--vm-navy); } .vm-status-message { color: var(--vm-slate); line-height: 1.58; } .vm-status-loading { background: #f7fafc; border-color: #dbe4ec; } .vm-status-success { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eef9f4, #f6fcf8); border-color: #c5e8d7; } .vm-status-success .vm-status-title { color: var(--vm-success); } .vm-status-error { background: #fdf1f3; border-color: #f4c7cf; } .vm-status-error .vm-status-title { color: var(--vm-danger); } .vm-form-hidden { display: none !important; } .vm-host-field .control-label::after { content: '  Locked'; margin-left: 0.3rem; color: #6f8297; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; } .vm-locked-field .control-input { display: none !important; } .vm-hospitality-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 1rem; } .vm-hospitality-card { padding: 1rem 1.05rem; border: 1px solid #dce6ef; border-radius: 18px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #fbfdff, #f2f6fb); } .vm-hospitality-label { margin-bottom: 0.3rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6b8096; } .vm-hospitality-value { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; color: #17324d; } .web-form-footer { margin-top: 1.15rem; padding-top: 1.15rem; border-top: 1px solid rgba(217,227,236,0.9); } .discard-btn.btn, .submit-btn.btn { min-height: 3.05rem; border-radius: 999px; padding: 0.78rem 1.55rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.01em; } .discard-btn.btn { border: 1px solid #d7e1eb; background: #fff; color: #294360; } .submit-btn.btn { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2566a8, #17324d); border-color: transparent; color: #fff; box-shadow: 0 16px 30px rgba(23,50,77,0.2); } .submit-btn.btn:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); } .file-upload-area, .attached-file { border-radius: 18px !important; border: 1px dashed #c7d5e2 !important; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #fbfdff, #f3f7fb) !important; } .btn-file-upload, .attached-file-link { font-weight: 700; color: var(--vm-accent); } @media (max-width: 767px) { .page_content { padding-top: 0.85rem; } .web-form-title h1 { font-size: 2rem; } .web-form { padding: 1.25rem 1rem 1rem; border-radius: 22px; } .row.form-section { padding: 1rem 0.8rem 0.6rem; } .vm-hospitality-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .discard-btn.btn, .submit-btn.btn { width: 100%; } .web-form-footer .right-area { display: grid; gap: 0.75rem; width: 100%; } }
introduction_text: Please complete your visitor pre-registration before arrival. Review the host-approved visit details shown above, then provide your identity and contact information in the fields below.
name: visitor-pre-registration-form
success_message: Your pre-registration has been received successfully. Our team will review it and continue the visitor approval process.
title: Visitor Access Pre-Registration
